description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and logs into the GitLab Container Registry in a before_script. Define a single stage named build. Add a build-master job in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". Add a build-tag job in the build stage that runs only on tags, executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG". Both jobs share the same before_script login.
